title: Hotter Seas in Britain and Europe Threaten Marine Life
summary_full: Higher sea temperatures have followed scorching weather across Europe, prompting Britain’s weather service to declare a “severe” marine heat wave.
summary_public: Higher sea temperatures have followed scorching weather across Europe, prompting Britain’s weather service to declare a “severe” marine heat wave.

GB.label: negative
